response.justification: While the candidate demonstrates exceptional software engineering capability and progression to Staff Engineer at Stripe, they fall short on critical technical requirements. The role requires 8 years of C++ experience, but the resume shows minimal C++ exposure (approximately 6 months at National Instruments in 2014-2015). Additionally, although the candidate has worked on high-performance systems and some cloud infrastructure (AWS CDK at Shopify), there is insufficient evidence of 5+ years building large-scale cloud compute platform architecture or leading deep distributed systems infrastructure, which are core to this technical lead position.
strengths: Demonstrated progression to Staff Engineer at Stripe with strong full-stack capability across multiple platforms and languages
Clear track record of establishing engineering best practices, mentoring, and leading technical initiatives across organizations
Proven ability to architect and own complex systems, from real-time data platforms to automation infrastructure
concerns: Minimal C++ programming experience (one 6-month role) despite requirement for 8 years in this critical language
No clear evidence of owning large-scale cloud compute platform development or distributed systems infrastructure at the required depth
Limited demonstrated background in cloud or DevOps-specific technical mentoring within engineering leadership roles

key_factors.factor: Cloud compute platform and distributed systems leadership
